name: goodbye-google-gmailinbox-edition
description: John Thomas's practical guide to leaving Gmail and reclaiming your privacy. A step-by-step playbook covering why to leave Google, how to migrate your email, and how to delete your account permanently.
useCase: A complete guide for anyone who wants to stop using Gmail, reclaim their digital privacy, and take control of their personal data.
knownRisks: The book was published in 2017; some specific services, pricing, and Google's policies may have changed since then.
Migrating email is technically complex and may take weeks to fully complete.
Some services (banking, government) may be difficult to migrate from Gmail with certain providers.
